items.title: [正面] I genuinely hate deck building and turn/card based...
items.summary:
I genuinely hate deck building and turn/card based games but this game is an exception. The story is amazing although there are some problems with the translation once in a while it isn't really anything to confuse anyone. 

The gameplay tho, I thought this was just a generic gacha game where u get a unit and obliterate stages till the next one comes up. But nope. Game is extremely hardcore, bosses looks at u like a bug and if u give them the chance, they will indeed one shot you. U try to survive end with some miracle manage to survive and kill the enemy. It is extremely fun and engaging. 

The game itself is extremely free to play. They give u summons like they don't want ur money. I learned game almost got shut down after the 1st story arc finished. I'm glad it didn't. I dunno how this game manages to fly unnoticed but it is a real gem.

items.title: [正面] This is a delightful game. It provides a chance to...
items.summary:
This is a delightful game. It provides a chance to unwind and engage your mind. The soundtrack and visuals are top-notch. The characters in the game are captivating. The game's aesthetic is not designed for children. It is more mature and melancholic. I thoroughly enjoy this game.

I am unsure whether the game is free or not, but I believe it is worth trying. I am not a fan of games with gatcha mechanics. I have only tried one and found it unappealing, but this game is quite enjoyable.
If you encounter difficulties while playing on Linux or Steam Deck, consider using Proton GE. It worked for me.
